name: grab-a-court
description: Tennis club court reservation demo application

scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev -w backend" "npm run dev -w frontend"
scripts.run: npm run build && concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run start -w backend" "npm run preview -w frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w backend && npm run build -w frontend
scripts.test: npm run test -w backend && npm run test -w frontend
scripts.test:coverage: npm run test:coverage -w backend && npm run test:coverage -w frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w backend && npm run lint -w frontend
